---
title: "Projects"
---

## 🎓 Academic & Research Projects


::: {.academic-card}

### H-1B Visa Labor Market Analysis

<div class="project-meta">
Data Analysis Project • UCLA STATS 140XP
</div>

- Analyzed U.S. **H-1B visa application data** to investigate trends in employment-based immigration
- Explored patterns in **job roles, sponsoring companies, and wage distributions**
- Conducted data cleaning, exploratory analysis, and visualization
- Produced a **reproducible Quarto report** communicating statistical insights

<div class="project-tools">
Tools: R · Quarto · Data Visualization · Statistical Analysis
</div>

:::



::: {.academic-card}

### Goodreads Review Rating Prediction

<div class="project-meta">
Machine Learning Project • UCLA STATS 101C
</div>

- Built a **natural language processing model** to predict Goodreads review ratings
- Processed a dataset containing **10,000 books and over 6 million ratings**
- Implemented a neural network using **PyTorch**
- Achieved **88% prediction accuracy** using sentiment signals in review text

<div class="project-tools">
Tools: Python · PyTorch · NLP · Machine Learning
</div>

:::



::: {.academic-card}

### Kaggle Predictive Modeling Competition

<div class="project-meta">
Machine Learning Project • UCLA STATS 101C
</div>

- Developed predictive models using **regularized regression techniques**
- Implemented **LASSO and Ridge regression** for feature selection and generalization
- Tuned model hyperparameters to reduce overfitting
- Evaluated models using cross-validation and prediction error metrics

<div class="project-tools">
Tools: R · LASSO · Ridge Regression · Cross-Validation · Predictive Modeling
</div>

:::
## 🏢 Industry Projects

::: {.industry-card}

### Digital Revenue Analytics (Warner Music Group) 

<div class="project-meta">
Data Science Intern • Warner Chappell Music
</div>

- Developed analytics workflows to analyze **global digital music revenue performance**
- Worked with the **Global Digital Finance team** on forecasting and reporting initiatives
- Built internal tools for tracking **streaming and publishing performance metrics**
- Gained exposure to **digital music licensing and publishing agreements**

<div class="project-tools">
Tools: Python · Data Analysis · Financial Analytics
</div>

:::


::: {.industry-card}

### Supply Chain ETA Prediction  (Kohl’s)

<div class="project-meta">
Machine Learning Project • Retail Supply Chain
</div>

- Developed machine learning models to predict **shipment arrival times**
- Implemented models including **Random Forest, Gradient Boosting, and regression approaches**
- Built feature pipelines using logistics and transit data
- Evaluated model performance using error metrics and validation techniques

<div class="project-tools">
Tools: Python · XGBoost · Random Forest · Feature Engineering
</div>

:::


::: {.industry-card}

### Fleet Safety Analytics (Michelin Connected Fleet)

<div class="project-meta">
Data Science Consulting Project
</div>

- Analyzed telematics data to evaluate **driver braking behavior and fleet safety patterns**
- Investigated strategies for **adaptive braking thresholds**
- Evaluated tradeoffs between **static and dynamic safety scoring models**
- Developed an analytical framework for improving fleet safety metrics

<div class="project-tools">
Tools: Python · Statistical Analysis · Data Modeling
</div>

:::

::: {.industry-card}

### LA River Community Infrastructure Initiative

<div class="project-meta">
Consultant • Mar 2024 – Jun 2024
</div>

- Collaborated with a nonprofit organization working to develop a **community park and infrastructure project along the Los Angeles River**
- Collected and analyzed stakeholder and regional data to support **investment and development strategy**
- Redesigned the organization’s **website and digital presence** to improve outreach and transparency
- Developed a **data-driven pitch deck** outlining project impact, funding strategy, and community benefits for potential investors

<div class="project-tools">
Tools: Data Analysis · Research · Strategic Consulting · Web Development
</div>

:::

::: {.industry-card}

### Ronald McDonald House Charities — Volunteer Engagement Strategy

<div class="project-meta">
Project Manager • Apr 2025 – Jun 2025 • Contract
</div>

- Developed a **data-driven strategy** to improve volunteer satisfaction and long-term engagement
- Analyzed volunteer survey data to identify **key barriers to retention** and areas for program improvement
- Designed recommendations to **increase volunteer donation participation**
- Proposed a strategy projected to **increase donated funds by approximately 40%**

<div class="project-tools">
Tools: Data Analysis · Survey Analysis · Program Strategy · Stakeholder Research
</div>

:::

::: {.industry-card}

### Palo Alto Medical Foundation — Healthcare Analytics

<div class="project-meta">
Consultant • Sep 2024 – Feb 2025
</div>

- Led data collection from **1,600 physicians**, analyzing survey responses in Excel to identify operational insights
- Designed an **interactive Tableau dashboard** for real-time patient tracking and physician allocation
- Used **Python analysis** to evaluate volunteer participation and support a healthcare pilot program serving 2,000 patients
- Conducted market research on comparable programs and defined **KPIs (participation rate, patient satisfaction)** to improve pilot program performance by **20%**

<div class="project-tools">
Tools: Python · Tableau · Excel · Data Analysis · Healthcare Analytics
</div>

:::

::: {.industry-card}

### FoodFinder:  National Food Pantry Data Initiative

<div class="project-meta">
Data Analyst • Nonprofit Data Infrastructure
</div>

- Worked with a national nonprofit database tracking **food pantries and food assistance programs across the United States**
- Cleaned and standardized **50,000+ records** using Python and regular expression parsing
- Built geographic visualizations and **interactive maps using GeoPandas** to identify gaps in food assistance coverage
- Generated regional insights that enabled outreach to **6,000 food pantries nationwide**

<div class="project-tools">
Tools: Python · GeoPandas · Data Cleaning · Data Visualization · Tableau
</div>

:::

::: {.industry-card}

### Iconic — Financial Data Pipeline & Valuation Analysis

<div class="project-meta">
Data Analytics Project • Mergers & Acquisitions Firm
</div>

- Automated company valuation analysis by integrating **Alpha Vantage API** to extract financial data for public companies
- Conducted rigorous quality assessments of multiple financial data sources, evaluating **accuracy, completeness, and reliability** before selecting the optimal dataset
- Developed a **data pipeline** to streamline comparison of valuation multiples including **EV/Revenue and EV/EBITDA**
- Designed an **interactive Tableau dashboard** enabling users to adjust parameters and generate customized valuation forecasts

<div class="project-tools">
Tools: Python · Alpha Vantage API · Financial Data Analysis · Tableau
</div>

:::

---
